brief: Regulatory moves target tech giants and AI risks while natural disasters and political tensions dominate headlines. Research explores AI in crime linkage and creative coding, alongside visualization tools for data analysis.
news_summary: UK proposes banning scam ads and giving Bank of England powers over tech firms; Typhoon Bavi threatens East Asia; Spain wildfire kills 12. Political turmoil includes Trump firing election officials and US-Iran mediation.
papers_summary: Studies examine AI-assisted crime linkage analysis and brain-computer interface clinical translation in China. Visualization research covers missing data diagnosis and compositional analysis of Chinese paintings.

en.brief: Regulatory moves target tech giants and AI risks while natural disasters and political tensions dominate headlines. Research explores AI in crime linkage and creative coding, alongside visualization tools for data analysis.
en.news_summary: UK proposes banning scam ads and giving Bank of England powers over tech firms; Typhoon Bavi threatens East Asia; Spain wildfire kills 12. Political turmoil includes Trump firing election officials and US-Iran mediation.
en.papers_summary: Studies examine AI-assisted crime linkage analysis and brain-computer interface clinical translation in China. Visualization research covers missing data diagnosis and compositional analysis of Chinese paintings.

zh.brief: 今日重點：福建鞋廠火災致28人遇難、美伊衝突持續、印尼兒童販運案引發關注。國際方面，英國擬立法打擊詐騙廣告，AI風險警示及強颱風逼近東亞。研究聚焦AI應用於犯罪關聯分析、腦機介面臨床轉化及手語辨識。
zh.news_summary: 中國新聞包括晉江鞋廠大火、廣西水庫失效、美伊互相攻擊；國際焦點為英國詐騙廣告禁令、強颱風巴維逼近、以及印度女童遭性侵案。
zh.papers_summary: 本日論文探討AI在犯罪關聯分析中的應用、缺失資料視覺化、中國腦機介面臨床試驗，以及基於深度學習的手語辨識手套。

todays_image.caption: Both the mid-20th century ballot box and today's proposed ban on scam ads aim to preserve trust in democratic and commercial systems by safeguarding against manipulation.
todays_image.title: Ballot box, mid-20th century
